creator: iblis.dif01@nctu.edu.tw
text:
Created attachment 197775
libwebsockets v2.4.2 patch

Changelog is here: https://github.com/warmcat/libwebsockets/blob/master/changelog#L179

Although there is a v3.0.0 release, net/mosquitto is not compatible with that release yet.
I want to keep this port in v2.x version.
